'''鈭歾-b-zh''' ('''kazabazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:histoculture|histoculture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:histoculture|histoculture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-b-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kazabazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizabazh|thizabazh]] || [[word:jizabazh|jizabazh]] || [[word:shizabazh|shizabazh]] || [[word:kizabazh|kizabazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzabazh|thuthuzabazh]] || [[word:jujuzabazh|jujuzabazh]] || [[word:shushuzabazh|shushuzabazh]] || [[word:kukuzabazh|kukuzabazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzabazh|thuzabazh]] || [[word:juzabazh|juzabazh]] || [[word:shuzabazh|shuzabazh]] || [[word:kuzabazh|kuzabazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzabazh|thuzabazh]] || [[word:juzabazh|juzabazh]] || [[word:shuzabazh|shuzabazh]] || [[word:kuzabazh|kuzabazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezabazh|thezabazh]] || [[word:jezabazh|jezabazh]] || [[word:shezabazh|shezabazh]] || [[word:kezabazh|kezabazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozabazh|thothozabazh]] || [[word:jojozabazh|jojozabazh]] || [[word:shoshozabazh|shoshozabazh]] || [[word:kokozabazh|kokozabazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozabazh|thozabazh]] || [[word:jozabazh|jozabazh]] || [[word:shozabazh|shozabazh]] || [[word:kozabazh|kozabazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozabazh|thozabazh]] || [[word:jozabazh|jozabazh]] || [[word:shozabazh|shozabazh]] || [[word:kozabazh|kozabazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zabazh|th忙zabazh]] || [[word:j忙zabazh|j忙zabazh]] || [[word:sh忙zabazh|sh忙zabazh]] || [[word:k忙zabazh|k忙zabazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazabazh|thathazabazh]] || [[word:jajazabazh|jajazabazh]] || [[word:shashazabazh|shashazabazh]] || [[word:kakazabazh|kakazabazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazabazh|thazabazh]] || [[word:jazabazh|jazabazh]] || [[word:shazabazh|shazabazh]] || [[word:kazabazh|kazabazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazabazh|thazabazh]] || [[word:jazabazh|jazabazh]] || [[word:shazabazh|shazabazh]] || [[word:kazabazh|kazabazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazabazh|shazabazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazabazh|goshazabazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazabazh|gokishazabazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazabazhn眉|shazabazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkn眉|goshazabazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazabazhn眉|gokishazabazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazabazhsh毛|shazabazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazabazhnksh毛|goshazabazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazabazhsh毛|gokishazabazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazabazhro|shazabazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkro|goshazabazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazabazhro|gokishazabazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazabazhmu|shazabazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkmu|goshazabazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazabazhmu|gokishazabazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazabazhsher|shazabazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazabazhnksher|goshazabazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazabazhsher|gokishazabazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazabazhng|shazabazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkng|goshazabazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazabazhng|gokishazabazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazabazhya|shazabazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkya|goshazabazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazabazhya|gokishazabazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazabazhyam|shazabazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkyam|goshazabazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazabazhyam|gokishazabazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazabazhn眉sh毛|shazabazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkn眉sh毛|goshazabazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazabazhn眉sh毛|gokishazabazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazabazhn眉ro|shazabazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkn眉ro|goshazabazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazabazhn眉ro|gokishazabazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazabazhn眉mu|shazabazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkn眉mu|goshazabazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazabazhn眉mu|gokishazabazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazabazhsh毛n眉|shazabazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazabazhnksh毛n眉|goshazabazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazabazhsh毛n眉|gokishazabazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazabazhsh毛ro|shazabazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazabazhnksh毛ro|goshazabazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazabazhsh毛ro|gokishazabazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazabazhsh毛mu|shazabazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazabazhnksh毛mu|goshazabazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazabazhsh毛mu|gokishazabazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazabazhron眉|shazabazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkron眉|goshazabazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazabazhron眉|gokishazabazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazabazhrosh毛|shazabazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkrosh毛|goshazabazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazabazhrosh毛|gokishazabazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazabazhromu|shazabazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkromu|goshazabazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazabazhromu|gokishazabazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazabazhmun眉|shazabazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkmun眉|goshazabazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazabazhmun眉|gokishazabazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazabazhmush毛|shazabazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkmush毛|goshazabazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazabazhmush毛|gokishazabazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazabazhmuro|shazabazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazabazhnkmuro|goshazabazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazabazhmuro|gokishazabazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
